PowerShell($f='c:\\tmp\\v2-pipeline.log'; Get-Item $f | Select-Object Length, LastWriteTime; Write-Output "---"; Select-String -Path $f -Pattern "starting at|done\\s|skipped|ERROR|Pipeline finished" -Encoding utf8 | Select-Object -Last 60 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '\\x00','' })

hooks.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ts = Get-Date -Format o; $tool = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME; $file = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH; if (-not (Test-Path 'c:\tmp')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'c:\tmp' -Force | Out-Null }; Add-Content -Path 'c:\tmp\joola-intel-session-changes.log' -Value (\"$ts`t$tool`t$file\") -Encoding utf8"

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$cmd = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND; if ($cmd -match 'git\s+push' -and $cmd -notmatch '--dry-run' -and -not (Test-Path 'c:\tmp\joola-intel-qa-passed.flag')) { Write-Host '[hook] WARN: QA flag missing. Consider running qa/regression.ps1 before push.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }"
